title: Dev Proxy WebSocketMockResponsePlugin mocks
description: Mocks for the Dev Proxy WebSocketMockResponsePlugin

$schema.description: The JSON schema reference for validation.

url.description: The WebSocket URL to match. Accepts ws://, wss://, http:// or https:// (schemes are normalized when matching) and supports * wildcards.

onConnect.description: Messages sent to the client immediately after the handshake, in order.

rules.description: Reactive rules evaluated in order against each inbound client message.

match.description: How to match an inbound client message. Omit (or leave empty) to match any message. When more than one is set, precedence is bodyJson > bodyRegex > bodyFragment.

bodyFragment.description: A case-insensitive substring matched against the inbound message text.

bodyRegex.description: A regular expression matched against the inbound message text.

bodyJson.description: A JSON value compared structurally (key-order-independent) against the inbound message parsed as JSON.

responses.description: Messages to send to the client when this rule matches.

closeAfter.description: When true, the mock server closes the connection after replying. Default is false.

closeOnUnmatched.description: When true, the mock server closes if an inbound message matches no rule. Default is false.

body.description: The message payload. Sent verbatim for text, base64-decoded for binary.

messageType.description: Whether body is text or base64 binary. Default is text.
